sellingList.light: 【Projectors & Night Lights】 Our water ripple light has 16 colors and 4 lighting modes. 4 dynamic lighting modes give you more choices of backgrounds for picture taking with 16 dynamic lighting effects. The lighting effects and brightness of the water ripple can be adjusted by remote control. Our water wave light is a good choice for bedroom decorations

【USB & Remote Control】The waterwave light has a remote control function, which can be adjusted within 16.4 feet and can adjust the lighting mode, brightness, lighting effect and music mode as needed. The waterwave light connects via USB, allowing you to power up anytime, anywhere via USB devices such as rechargeable batteries, computers, and chargers.

【Unique Design】 Our water ripple lamp has a unique design. The lampshade is made of high-quality acrylic, and the surface is covered with a layer of water ripple film. The lamp is made of PVC and has a silicone seal ring. The lamp is not easy to leak. The lamp base is made of high-quality ABS material, and the bottom is non-slip, which can effectively prevent the lamp from shaking and ensure the safety of use

【Romantic Decoration】 Our water ripple lamp has a romantic and dreamy lighting effect, which can create a romantic and warm atmosphere, making your room more beautiful and dreamy. Our water ripple lamp is very suitable for bedroom decoration, parties, weddings, children's rooms, living rooms, etc.

【Perfect Gift】 Our water ripple lamp has a unique and beautiful design, which is very suitable as a gift for family and friends. Our water ripple lamp is very suitable for bedroom decoration, parties, weddings, children's rooms, living rooms, etc. It is the best gift choice for holidays, birthdays, Christmas, New Year and other festivals

reviewsList.name: SoCal Momma
reviewsList.comment: Love this for adding some dimension to foodscape tables! Just adds movement and excitement that really helps a party feel like A PARTY! This is simple and easy to use. Better in dim lighting (no surprise there), but really nice and beautiful. Highly reccomend!

reviewsList.name: Trevor William DeSilva
reviewsList.comment:
I almost returned this because it wouldn't turn on and I thought it was defective (supported by other reviews saying the same). Turns out that for some reason, it wasn't compatible with the charging cable I was using. Switching cables, including the one it came with, solved the issue. A green light will turn on inside the lamp to let you know it's charging.

The light has 16 discrete color options, a continuous RGB cycle mode, rechargeable battery, touch button (which can do everything the remote can except for brightness adjustment, as far as I can tell), and despite its small (3.5"x4") size, outputs enough light to illuminate an at least 9x12 ft room with a 9 ft ceiling (from the top of a 2.5 ft desk - see attached video).

Couple quirks I've noticed: changing the brightness of the lamp also changes the speed of the water effect (brighter=faster). As far as I can tell, there is no way to separate the two. It also doesn't appear to be possible to change the brightness of the RGB cycle mode.

While I could nitpick about these quirks or the fact that the touch button doesn't cycle the colors in an intuitive way (goes in order of the colors on the remote from left to right instead of top to bottom), this product does exactly what I wanted at the lowest price I found, and for that, it gets five stars.

reviewsList.name: Deborah W
reviewsList.comment: I have a fireplace that we don't use for wood-burning, but I do like to add a bit of light to it (sometimes an indoor fire pit, other times just colorful lights). This lamp is awesome for adding that little bit of color and movement of light. The remote makes it easy to choose the desired color, but the lamp can be turned on/off and the color changed with a touch-switch at the base of the lamp. I am not disappointed by this light show.

reviewsList.name: Shirls
reviewsList.comment: Love this lamp would recommend it 100% it's amazing it's unreal the lazor an lights on ceiling are stunning.  I'm sorry I didn't purchase lots more now for family n Freinds I'm that chuffed

reviewsList.name: Poetic Justice
reviewsList.comment:
The Bizggco Water Ripple Lamp is a decent product that I recently had the chance to try out. Its small, compact size and lightweight build make it portable and easy to move around.

Crafted from clear acrylic, this projector stands sturdy. The minimalist design is simple and satisfying.
With low to moderate brightness, the projector isn't flashy or annoying. It causes a watery pattern to swirl around the walls, although it doesn't project very far.

The limited lighting area does have an intimate charm. The rechargeable battery is nice, but I just plug it in and leave it charged. Equipped with a remote control, the Bizggco projector produces several different colors and can also project a multi-color mix. However, I still can't quite figure out where the buttons are located on the lamp itself.

I've sampled several of these sorts of projectors and can say this product is pretty good. It is certainly reliable. The subtle, soothing display would make a perfect night light.

reviewsList.name: lost in space
reviewsList.comment:
This night light projector is a little more cheaply made than I anticipated, but for its small size and lightweight design it emits a surprisingly bright light (as long as your room is reasonably dark). I have high ceilings in my apartment, and although the projector's beam is fairly expansive, you really need to place it in the center of the room to get the full effect if you want the light to cover your entire ceiling.

The projector offers various settings accessible through the accompanying remote, featuring seven different lighting modes and colors. You can choose to flash or change effects, and the projection light even has several settings to respond to music with varying light effects. The unit is powered by a USB cord (it comes with the cord, but not a plug... you'll have to supply your own). The color effects are beautiful and create moving wave formations on your walls and/or ceiling that I personally found created a very relaxing ambiance.

reviewsList.name: Trevor William DeSilva
reviewsList.comment: This USB lamp is nice to have. You can have your own personal light show with a water ripple effect. It comes with a remote control and USB cord. It would have been nice if the USB cord was longer. When you plug the USB cord in you will have to use the remote control to turn it on. Then press on a color or effect that you like. I noticed that once I turned it off for awhile, I was unable to turn it back on unless I unplugged the USB cord and then plugged it back into the lamp, making this inconvenient.

reviewsList.name: 808oahugrown
reviewsList.comment: Upon receiving this item the first time around, I was very disappointed to see that there was no water/ripple effect. All it did was light up. Hoping that it was a defective item, I contacted seller and they immediately shipped me out a replacement. Kudos to the seller for outstanding customer service! So glad I waited to review this item because after receiving my replacement, I am in awe with this little lamp of awesomeness. It has a very soothing, tropical oasis vibe that I’m loving. There are many color selections to choose from; the primary being red, green, blue and white along with 12 more shades. There are also 4 different settings; flash, strobe, fade or smooth. I personally prefer the ripple effect with no setting. Comes with a little remote control and usb cord. The only thing I dislike is that when plugged in, it emits a green light that will not shut off (see pic). No biggie by any means, I just unplug it when not in use. Overall and based off my replacement, I highly recommend this product!

reviewsList.name: Purchasing Drone
reviewsList.comment: The light provided is fairly bright and will illuminate a small room enough to see and move around. We put this in the kids bathroom so they have a nightlight there. The ripple effect is subtle but noticeable. The item feels cheap plastic and easily breakable, also it is not particularly attractive without the light on. The light does produce motor sound when turned on, but very faintly so it is hardly noticeable. It requires a USB adapter to charge. The remote function all work without issue. Overall its decent and for the most part successfully creates the ambiance advertised.

reviewsList.name: Diane
reviewsList.comment: Bought this to use with a miniature aluminum christmas tree as a color changing light. Makes really nice color mixtures and effects. Could be used anytime for mood/accent light. Works good, easy to use.

reviewsList.name: Nurse Lady
reviewsList.comment: Better to not leave this product plugged in for long periods of time... lightbulb gets a little hot. Super bright and beautiful though!

reviewsList.name: Annabel and Asa
reviewsList.comment: I bought it as a gift for my sister and she loves it. It goes over her whole ceiling and makes for a great mood light. The control changes each color of the outer ring individually so you can make different combinations.

reviewsList.name: Kleih
reviewsList.comment: This product is awesome!!!!!! I’ve been looking for a good sunset lamp for a while then I pick this one. It’s very easy to set up! The light looks very good! It’s very helpful for me to take a good portrait picture at home.

reviewsList.name: vinegar
reviewsList.comment: Initial problem soon sorted fantastic customer service. Quick response to my problem really pleased with product, thank you.

reviewsList.name: Sara O
reviewsList.comment: This lamp works really well and adds a really cool water/galaxy effect to my room. I really like that it is rechargeable so I don't have to worry about batteries. There is a power button on the side that cycles through a few colors, or using the remote lets you set any color and a few color-changing modes. Just be sure to take the little plastic strip out of the remote first so it works (ask me how I know). This lamp is best for a smaller space like a bedroom and isn't really bright enough to light a large space.
